description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is launching the app for the first time

**NOTE:** To simulate launching the app for the first time, the tester needs to select the "Clear Browser Storage" button in Dev Settings on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN the Getting Started page loads
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Welcome to the official streaming app of Major League Baseball. Press or scroll down to view your options. Getting Started, press select to create a new MLB.TV account, Press or scroll down if you already have an MLB.TV account."
